purpose: Document the expected sibling-checkout model so concurrent PR and runtime sprints do not share one mutable folder.

protectedRuntimeCheckout.defaultBranchRole: current user-owned runtime sprint branch, not a generic PR scratchpad
forbiddenWithoutExplicitOwnership: git switch to an unrelated PR branch
git checkout to an unrelated PR branch
git reset --hard for a PR review lane
PR-specific patch scripts that mutate source or artifacts
runtime validation for a different PR lane

forbiddenShortcut: Do not treat BlacksmithGuild and BlacksmithGuild-prNN-short-name as interchangeable.
